alerts.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production-focused design tool
alerts.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6 million to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

alerts.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
alerts.description: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown tenfold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: OpenAI revenue chief Dresser says enterprise AI adoption is 'at a tipping point'
alerts.description: The OpenAI Development Company is a partnership with 19 investment and consultancy firms and is majority-owned and controlled by the startup.

alerts.title: Circle raises $222 million from BlackRock, Apollo and others in Arc token presale valued at $3 billion
alerts.description: Andreessen Horowitz served as the lead investor in the sale with a $75 million investment. Other investors include BlackRock and Apollo Funds.

alerts.title: Turning AI cost spikes into strategic growth opportunities
alerts.description:
Presented by Apptio, an IBM company

AI spending is surging, but the full impact often remains an open question. Closing the gap requires clear answers to how AI is governed, measured, and tied to business outcomes.
